summary: Executed backend + frontend validation for tracking, admin subscriptions, booking filters/search, worker suggestions, and core regressions (booking/contact/worker/admin dashboard).
action_items: No functional blockers found in requested phase scope.
Optional hardening: replace synchronous requests calls inside async backend notification/payment helpers with async HTTP client to prevent event-loop blocking under concurrency.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py executes synchronous requests.post in async paths (_send_email_message, _send_sms_message, _create_razorpay_order), which can reduce throughput under load.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple UITEST/TEST bookings, contacts, workers, and subscriptions via API and UI during this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase-3 targeted checks passed: /track-booking works with valid booking ID, /api/bookings/track/{id} success+404 validated, admin subscriptions endpoint/tab render correctly, admin search/filters operate, suggest-workers updates booking draft status to assigned. Notification behavior validated: SMS path reports Twilio not configured, email path attempts SendGrid (not marked as unconfigured).
rca of the issue: No product defect reproduced in this iteration. One Playwright strict-selector conflict occurred in test script (text 'Pending' matched stat label + dropdown option); resolved by role=option scoped selector.
